title: Chelonanthus alatus
taxonomy: Chelonanthus alatus is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Gentianaceae. It belongs to the genus Chelonanthus, which is a group of flowering plants native to the Americas. The plant's classification is further supported by its distinctive characteristics, such as its unique leaf shape and flower structure. Chelonanthus alatus is a relatively rare species, and its classification has been the subject of ongoing research and study. The classification of Chelonanthus alatus reflects its evolutionary relationships with other plants in the Gentianaceae family.
